title: Re-add automation-runner capability kind + repair scheduler manifest (and its automation ecosystem) to the 6-roles schema

tests.summary: 3 passed ‚Äî automation-runner ‚àà capabilityKinds; scheduler parses+validates+selectable (faculty observability, provides automation-runner); the 4 ecosystem fittings parse under shape-driven roles (loop-heartbeat‚Üíobservability; morning-briefing/google-calendar/vault-sync‚Üísessions). Full suite 506 passed / 9 skipped / 0 failed (docs-consistency updated for the re-add).

validateFitting.summary: PASS ‚Äî architecture/security/prompt-injection/quality; parsed faculty observability as script, provides 1 capability

build.summary: Next build compiled, all routes rendered

e2e.summary: N/A ‚Äî manifest + lib + enum slice; proof is the committed vitest gate + validate-fitting

blockers: personal-operative remains de-listed (out of scope): it consumes the dropped `soul` + `agent-skill` kinds, which the pivot retired and the MR wave does NOT restore. It is a parked PA-bucket fitting ‚Äî re-adding automation-runner alone cannot heal it. Logged, not silently dropped.
notes: Re-added `automation-runner` to capabilityKinds (src/lib/types.ts) on the data-source (2026-06-10) precedent ‚Äî a kind is added only when a real Fitting needs one (here: the scheduler + the nightly Improver). Repaired the scheduler manifest's faculty (the dropped `scheduler` role ‚Üí `observability`) and re-homed the 4 ecosystem fittings to VALID roles, driven by validateFacultyCompatibility's shape + cardinality constraints: only `observability` accepts script-shaped single runners (scheduler, loop-heartbeat) and only `sessions` accepts cli-skill multi runners (morning-briefing, google-calendar, vault-sync). Updated docs/CAPABILITIES.md + tests/docs-consistency.test.ts (the code-derived RC5 gate) to move automation-runner from the dropped list to live+re-added. Satisfies brief ¬ß3 token scheduler-manifest-ok.
